column2: SUS cannot preserve some chart information. Review the items below before exporting.
Items that will not be preserved
Life point is not supported by SUS
Waypoints are not saved in SUS
Layer folder data is not saved in SUS
Fixed note speed is not saved in SUS
Skill effect and level are not saved in SUS
HiSpeed skip/ease/hide notes settings are not saved in SUS
Fractional lane notes cannot be exported to SUS
Fractional width notes cannot be exported to SUS
Dummy notes cannot be exported to SUS
Per-note sound effect settings are not saved in SUS
Down flick notes cannot be exported to SUS
Lane position is outside the SUS range
Note width is outside the SUS range
Some notes are placed where NextRUSH+ interprets them as Skill or FEVER
Guide colors are not fully saved in SUS
Hold Step Layer is not saved in SUS
